fields.explainZh: 当前正处于活动状态的物理连接数。
fields.explainEn: Number of active physical connections.

fields.explainZh: 可以使用的连接数。
fields.explainEn: Number of available connections.

fields.explainZh: 已经创建的连接数。
fields.explainEn: Number of created connections.

fields.explainZh: 数据源名称。
fields.explainEn: Data source name.

fields.explainZh: 数据源已经销毁的连接数。
fields.explainEn: Number of destroyed connections on the data source.

fields.explainZh: 当前正处于空闲状态的物理连接数。
fields.explainEn: Number of free physical connections.

fields.explainZh: 当前正处于使用状态的物理连接数。
fields.explainEn: Number of used physical connections.

fields.explainZh: 使用的最大连接数。
fields.explainEn: Maximum number of used connections.

fields.explainZh: 连接数据源的URL。
fields.explainEn: URL of the data source connection.

fields.explainZh: 数据源的名称。
fields.explainEn: Data source name.

fields.explainZh: 驱动名称。
fields.explainEn: Driver name.

fields.explainZh: 数据源是否可用。
fields.explainEn: Whether the data source is available.

fields.explainZh: JNDI名称。
fields.explainEn: JNDI name.

fields.explainZh: 数据源的统计信息是否可用，如果启用，将收集此缓存容器的统计信息。
fields.explainEn: Whether statistics collection is enabled for the data source. If this feature is enabled, the system collects statistics for the cache container.

fields.explainZh: 部署名称，部署的唯一标识符，在所有部署中必须是唯一的。
fields.explainEn: Deployment name, which uniquely identifies a deployment.

fields.explainZh: 上次禁用应用程序的时间。
fields.explainEn: Time when the application was disabled most recently.

fields.explainZh: 该部署是否可用。
fields.explainEn: Whether the deployment is available.

fields.explainZh: 上次启用应用程序的时间。
fields.explainEn: Time when the application was enabled most recently.

fields.explainZh: 指示是否管理部署（aka使用ContentRepository）。
fields.explainEn: Whether the deployment is managed (aka uses ContentRepository).

fields.explainZh: 在部署中的运行时名称。
fields.explainEn: Name of the deployment when it is running.

fields.explainZh: 部署的当前运行时状态。可能的状态模式为OK、FAILED和STOPPED。FAILED表示缺少依赖项或服务无法启动。STOPPED表示部署未启用或已手动停止。
fields.explainEn: Current state of the deployment. Supported states include OK, FAILED, and STOPPED. FAILED indicates that the deployment cannot start because the items or services on which the deployment depends are missing. STOPPED indicates that the deployment is not enabled or is manually stopped.

fields.explainZh: 已提交的堆内存大小。
fields.explainEn: Size of the committed heap memory.

fields.explainZh: 堆内存的最大值（若未定义，则显示为-1）。
fields.explainEn: Maximum size of heap memory. (-1 is displayed if this parameter is not specified)

fields.explainZh: 堆内存利用率。
fields.explainEn: Usage of heap memory.

fields.explainZh: 已使用的堆内存大小。
fields.explainEn: Size of used heap memory.

fields.explainZh: 已提交的非堆内存大小。
fields.explainEn: Size of the committed non-heap memory.

fields.explainZh: 非堆内存的最大值（若未定义，则显示为-1）。
fields.explainEn: Maximum size of non-heap memory. (-1 is displayed if this parameter is not specified)

fields.explainZh: 非堆内存利用率。
fields.explainEn: Usage of non-heap memory.

fields.explainZh: 已使用的非堆内存大小。
fields.explainEn: Size of used non-heap memory.

fields.explainZh: 预处理缓存的访问次数。
fields.explainEn: Number of accesses to the prepared cache.

fields.explainZh: 从预处理缓存中添加的语句数量。
fields.explainEn: Number of statements added from the prepared cache.

fields.explainZh: 预处理缓存中当前缓存的已准备好的和可调用的语句数。
fields.explainEn: Number of usable statements in the prepared cache.

fields.explainZh: 数据源名称。
fields.explainEn: Data source name.

fields.explainZh: 从预处理缓存中丢弃的语句数。
fields.explainEn: Number of statements dropped from the prepared cache.

fields.explainZh: 使用缓存中的语句的次数。
fields.explainEn: Number of times for which the cached statements are used.

fields.explainZh: 预处理缓存命中率。
fields.explainEn: Hit ratio of the prepared cache.

fields.explainZh: 无法使用缓存中的语句满足语句请求的次数。
fields.explainEn: Number of times for which the cached statements cannot satisfy statement requests.

fields.explainZh: 预处理缓存的丢失率。
fields.explainEn: Loss ratio of the prepared cache.

fields.explainZh: 启动服务器进程的方式。"DOMAIN"表示由主机控制器启动的域模式服务器，"STANDALONE"表示从命令行启动的独立服务器，或"EMBEDDED"表示作为运行在同一虚拟机中的应用程序的嵌入部分启动的独立服务器。
fields.explainEn: Method used to start the server process. DOMAIN represents that the server is in domain mode and is started by the host controller. STANDALONE represents that the server is in standalone mode and is started by CLI. EMBEDDED represents that the server is embedded in a program of the VM on which the server resides.

fields.explainZh: 此根资源表示的进程类型。服务器资源的值始终为"Server"。
fields.explainEn: Type of the process. The type of server resources is fixed at Server.

fields.explainZh: 当前服务器的产品信息，此服务器正在运行的基于WildFly核心的产品的名称及产品版本。
fields.explainEn: Product information of the server, including name and version of the WildFly-cored product.

fields.explainZh: 此服务器正在运行的WildFly Core版本。
fields.explainEn: WildFly Core version that the server is running.

fields.explainZh: 服务器的当前运行模式。NORMAL（正常操作）或ADMIN_ONLY。一个ADMIN_ONLY的服务器将启动任何配置的管理接口并接受管理请求，但不会启动用于处理最终用户请求的服务。
fields.explainEn: Running mode of the server. Supported modes include NORMAL and ADMIN_ONLY. An ADMIN_ONLY server starts the management interface regardless of the interface's configuration and accepts management requests. However, such server does not start the services that process ultimate user requests.

fields.explainZh: 当前的永久性配置状态，包含starting、ok、reload-required、restart-required、stopping或stopped。
fields.explainEn: Permanent state configured for the server. Supported states include starting, ok, reload-required, restart-required, stopping, and stopped.

fields.explainZh: 此服务器的名称。如果未设置，则默认为的运行时值InetAddress.getLocalHost().getHostName(),如12dc-cn-x64。
fields.explainEn: Name of the server. If the server is not configured with any name, the default server name is the runtime value InetAddress.getLocalHost().getHostName(), for example, 12dc-cn-x64.

fields.explainZh: 服务器控制器的当前状态：STARTING, RUNNING, RESTART_REQUIRED, RELOAD_REQUIRED or STOPPING。
fields.explainEn: State of the server controller. Supported states include STARTING, RUNNING, RESTART_REQUIRED, RELOAD_REQUIRED, and STOPPING.

fields.explainZh: 当前守护线程的数量。
fields.explainEn: Number of Daemon threads.

fields.explainZh: 守护线程占当前线程的比例。
fields.explainEn: Ratio of Daemon threads to existing threads.

fields.explainZh: 线程数量的峰值。
fields.explainEn: Peak number of threads.

fields.explainZh: 服务器当前存活的线程总数。
fields.explainEn: Number of surviving threads on the server.

fields.explainZh: 从服务器启动开始计算已经启动的线程总数。
fields.explainEn: Number of threads that started after the server started.

fields.explainZh: 测试IP对应资源的协议连接。
fields.explainEn: Test the protocol connections of the resource corresponding to an IP address.
